review_comment:
The race can happen only in async-commit. Another solution is if it's an async-commit transaction, don't read it and set minCommitTs to 0.

BTW, I find a bug in supporting external consistency. The minCommitTs got from PD is not persisted in TiKV. It can break external consistency in recovery and break the solution above.
If it's an async-commit, we still need to read it. This value can be set to ensure external consistency.
